quote: Forgiveness is not a passive release; it is a powerful declaration of freedom.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
Embracing forgiveness is a courageous act that liberates our spirits. It empowers us to reclaim our narratives and step boldly into a future filled with hope and freedom.

https://blog.revrandylewis.com/turning-the-page-together/
